```{r}
library(lubridate)
library(DT)
library(dplyr)

source("R/data.R")
d <- seec_read_data()

updated <- with_tz(Sys.time(), "Africa/Johannesburg")

year_degree_counts <- d$current_students %>%
  count(`First registered`, Degree, name = "Students") %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from = Degree,
    values_from = Students,
    values_fill = 0
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(`First registered`))


year_grad_counts <- d$past_students %>%
  count(`Graduation Year`, Degree, name = "Students") %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from = Degree,
    values_from = Students,
    values_fill = 0
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(`Graduation Year`))

year_postdoc_counts <- d$postdocs %>%
  count(Year, Department, name = "Students") %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(
    names_from = Department,
    values_from = Students,
    values_fill = 0
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(Year))

```
